pos_sentences.text: Faculty are the main part because they all are great scientist which teaches there field to us
pos_sentences.name: Niranjan behera

pos_sentences.text: Campus Life is very chill with a pressure of exams but you can enjoy
pos_sentences.name: Niranjan behera

pos_sentences.text: The hostel facility is much better than other institutions. Very well maintained and clean premises, within the lap of nature.
pos_sentences.name: Monami Sarkar

pos_sentences.text: Classes are very comfortable, with AC all the time. Good facility of Computer Labs, studying spaces for students along with a nice library.
pos_sentences.name: Monami Sarkar

pos_sentences.text: Very spacious and well equipped science laboratories, for all Physics, Chemistry and Biology. Different buildings for each stream.
pos_sentences.name: Monami Sarkar

pos_sentences.text: There is literally zero ragging culture , every senior here have that in mind that ragging should not be done.
pos_sentences.name: Nigam Jyoti Panigrahy

pos_sentences.text: Here we have amazing proffs, and other faculties
pos_sentences.name: Nigam Jyoti Panigrahy

pos_sentences.text: All basic needs for a student is available within the campus itself.Separate academic blocks for chemistry,physics and biology departments.Separate building for  classes called lecture hall complex.I cafe for tea and snacks.there are also shops
pos_sentences.name: Rasmiya

neg_sentences.text: My maths department and data science department have not their own building their construction is also going on , and data science department don't have any senior most proffesor with post of proffesor they have only assistant professor
neg_sentences.name: Uday Tiwari

neg_sentences.text: Library construction is also going on , because we don't have permanent library so this also a case
neg_sentences.name: Uday Tiwari

neg_sentences.text: Off Placement cell is not developed in my campus and on campus placement is not started  .this year I think it will develop
neg_sentences.name: Uday Tiwari

neg_sentences.text: Since it is within the hills, communication is not very easy. There are spotting of wild animals within the campus. Reaching the campus can be difficult since it takes almost 2 hours by cab from the railway station or airport.
neg_sentences.name: Monami Sarkar

neg_sentences.text: Food is not that great, but better than other hostels. The tenders keep changing and food quality keeps changing too.
neg_sentences.name: Monami Sarkar

neg_sentences.text: Administration is not very strong, they always like to implement useless things and want students to accept it happily.
neg_sentences.name: Monami Sarkar

neg_sentences.text: Remote location, difficulty in reaching main city
neg_sentences.name: Meghna Biswal

neg_sentences.text: Institute is far from the heart of the city it is in an western ghat forest.
neg_sentences.name: Niranjan behera

neg_sentences.text: Some time food is little bed but it depends because what ever you eat in your home you can't eat here just  need to follow what they give
neg_sentences.name: Niranjan behera
